---
title: "Discrete Math"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-14
listing:
  contents: "/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Discrete math explores combinatorial and geometric structures built from precise, countable objects rather than continuous ones. Each topic below walks through a classical result step by step, using interactive diagrams to make the underlying combinatorics tangible.
